title: Block Craft 1
description: Enhanced visuals, high FPS, and smart tools for a better Minecraft experience.
body:
Media:
![fd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wdjQTjBf/29043254bb123c66bf6cb25afdddce09bd8ff8db_96.webp)

⚙️ Performance & Optimization

Enjoy buttery-smooth gameplay with top-tier optimization mods:

Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast – Massive FPS boosts and lag reduction.

Entity Culling, Bobby, Model Gap Fix – Smarter rendering and visual fixes.

Distant Horizons – Adds breathtaking LOD rendering for faraway landscapes.

Euphoria Patches – Enhances shader and optimization compatibility.

🎨 Visuals & Shaders

Transform Minecraft’s look while keeping great performance:

Iris Shaders with Complementary Shaders – Unbound and Reimagined – Realistic lighting and shadows.

LambDynamicLights – Adds real-time dynamic lighting to items and entities.

Fusion (Connected Textures) & Fusion Connected Glass – Smooth, connected block textures.

3D Skin Layers – Adds extra depth and realism to player models.

🏗️ Building & Decoration

Expand your creativity with stylish building mods:

Macaw’s Doors, Windows, Lights, Fences, Bridges, Holidays, Paintings, Stairs, Trapdoors – Aesthetic and functional block additions.

Bundles Beyond – Enhanced bundle mechanics for better item storage.

🧭 Utility & Quality of Life

Improve your gameplay flow with essential tools:

JourneyMap, BlueMap – Interactive maps, both in-game and browser-based.

AppleSkin, Command Keys, Chat Calc, Zoomify, Freecam – Handy HUD and camera tools.

Shulker Box Tooltip, Hide Item Frame, Client Sort, Default Options – Inventory and UI improvements.

Simple Voice Chat – Integrated voice communication.

Here ‘n’ There, Flashback, Do a Barrel Roll – Teleportation and movement utilities.

💬 Configuration & Interface

Easily customize every mod:

Cloth Config API, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL), Config Manager, Mod Menu – User-friendly config interfaces.

Simple Menu, Inventive Inventory – Clean, intuitive menu design.

🔧 Compatibility & Core Libraries

Built on a stable Fabric foundation:

Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, Balm, Collective – Core modding frameworks.

MidnightLib, ukuLib, MaLiLib, Text Placeholder API – Embedded support libraries.

ViaFabricPlus – Connect to multiple Minecraft versions effortlessly.

AntiXray, CICADA, VoXY, Locator Heads, Camera Utils – Utility and server-friendly enhancements.

🎁 Extra Visual Tweaks (Overrides)

No Player Helmets v6.zip – Removes helmet rendering for cleaner visuals.

CC-RedstoneTweaks, CC-Extra-Tweaks, CC-Tweaks-1.21.9.zip, Minimal Armor v2.zip – Additional cosmetic and gameplay polish.

🚀 Key Features

✅ Optimized for Fabric 1.21.10
✅ All dependencies embedded — no external downloads
✅ Beautiful shaders and lighting
✅ Enhanced menus, HUD, and camera tools
✅ Seamless, stable, and immersive gameplay
